html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

The Psychosis Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using a Crow and Dark Petals, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 66% chance to result in a Dram of Psychic Fortitude and a 33% to result in a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.

Both potions restore the players' Sanity both upon consumption and slowly over time. The Dram initially restores 5 upon consumption, while the Tumblerful restores 15 upon consumption. During the next minute, both potions restore 1 every two seconds, adding up to a additional restoration of 30. Both potions can also be used as Fire Fuel.

Multiple potions are produced during crafting. For Dram Potions, there is a 20% chance to craft 3, 60% to craft 4, and 20% to craft 5. For Tumblerful Potions, there is a 20% chance to craft 1, 60% to craft 2, and 20% to craft 3.

Trivia

  • The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.

Gallery

  • All Hallowed Nights potions except for the Steeped Lunar Essence on the ground.
  • Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
“A potent potion.”
–Wilson, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Ah. The strong stuff.”
–Willow, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Is strong like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“If only life was so potent.”
–Wendy, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“LARGE UPGRADE”
–WX-78, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“A impressive elixer.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“That's a lot, eh.”
–Woodie, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Ah. This'll do the trick.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Förtune hath smiled upön me töday!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“It's pretty powerful.”
–Webber, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Oof, smells strong.”
–Warly, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Big thing for belly”
–Wormwood, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“I got lucky and got the big bottle.”
–Winona, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Hyuyu! This'll put tufts on your chest!”
–Wortox, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Has strong smell.”
–Wurt, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“Dabbling in witchcraft is fun!”
–Walter, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.
“I can feel the potential radiating out of it.”
–Wanda, when examining a Tumblerful of Psychic Fortitude.

During the next minute, both potions restore 1 every two seconds, adding up to a additional restoration of 30. Both potions can also be used as Fire Fuel.
Multiple potions are produced during crafting. For Dram Potions, there is a 20% chance to craft 3, 60% to craft 4, and 20% to craft 5. For Tumblerful Potions, there is a 20% chance to craft 1, 60% to craft 2, and 20% to craft 3.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thí nghiệm Tâm thần là một tính năng dành riêng cho sự kiện Đêm thiêng liêng trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tiến hành tại Phòng thí nghiệm khoa học điên, sử dụng Quạ và Cánh hoa đen, đồng thời làm cạn kiệt 10 của người chơi. Thí nghiệm có 66% cơ hội dẫn đến một Màn kịch về sức mạnh tâm linh và 33% dẫn đến một Cú ngã đầy sức mạnh tâm linh.
